question.text: Long-term capital gains on equity mutual funds (held > 12 months) exceeding Rs. 1.25 lakh per year are taxed at:

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Equity MF LTCG (holding > 12 months) is taxed at 12.5% under Section 112A, but only on gains exceeding Rs. 1.25 lakh per year. The first Rs. 1.25 lakh of LTCG in a financial year is exempt. This was changed from 10% above Rs. 1 lakh in July 2024 budget. **The Trap:** 10% above Rs. 1 lakh was the old rate. Current: 12.5% above Rs. 1.25 lakh. **Cross-Exam Context:** Updated LTCG rates are tested in V-A, X-A — always use current year rates. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Plan redemptions to stay within Rs. 1.25 lakh LTCG exemption annually — if a client has Rs. 3 lakh in gains, suggest staggering redemptions across 2-3 financial years.
